story: 107.R1 follow-up: toke repair sample-50 (1 Opus attempt each)

programs.hint: Missing semicolon. Toke separates EVERY statement with ; (never newlines). Every let/assignment/call/return needs a trailing ;. Inside lp(){body}, body statements also need ; between them.
programs.source: m=scoreboard;f=cmp(a:$str;b:$str):$i64{let ap=mut.0;let bp=mut.0;let n=mut.a.len;if(n>10){n=10};lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let c=a.get(i);if(c>64){if(c<91){ap=ap+1}};};n=b.len;if(n>10){n=10};lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let c=b.get(i);if(c>64){if(c<91){bp=bp+1}};};if(ap>bp){<1};if(ap<bp){<-1};<0};f=sortplayers(players:@$str;scores:@$i64):@$str{let n=players.len;let sorted=mut.players;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){lp(let j=0;j+1<n;j=j+1){let a=sorted.get(j);let b=sorted.get(j+1);let cmp=cmp(a;b);if(cmp>0){let tmp=sorted.get(j);sorted.get(j)=sorted.get(j+1);sorted.get(j+1)=tmp;};};};<sorted};f=topn(n:$i64):@$str{let sorted=sortplayers(players;scores);let m=sorted.len;let result=mut.@();lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){if(i<m){result=result+@(sorted.get(i))};};<result};f=main():$i64{let scores=@(100;90;95;105;100));let players=@("alice";"bob";"charlie";"dave";"eve"));let n=3;let top=topn(n);let m=top.len;lp(let i=0;i<m;i=i+1){let player=top.get(i);let score=100;let msg=player+s.concat(" has top score: ";score) as$str;};<0};

programs.hint: Runtime failure. Check stderr (in attempts/<id>/iter-N.error.txt) for the actual cause. Common: RT002 (integer overflow — use $f64 for large math), division by zero, OOB array access.
programs.source: m=mastermind;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=evaluate(secret:$str;guess:$str):$str{let result=mut."";let i=mut.0;lp(let idx=0;idx<guess.len;idx=idx+1){let g=guess.get(idx);let s=secret.get(idx);if(g=s){result=s.concat(result;"B");i=i+1;}el{let found=mut.false;lp(let jdx=0;jdx<secret.len;jdx=jdx+1){let s2=secret.get(jdx);if(!(found)){if(g=s2){found=true;};};};if(found){result=s.concat(result;"W");}el{};};};<result};f=main():$i64{let secret=io.readln();let guess=io.readln();let result=evaluate(secret;guess);let blacks=mut.0;let whites=mut.0;lp(let idx=0;idx<result.len;idx=idx+1){let c=result.get(idx);if(c="B"){blacks=blacks+1;}el{if(c="W"){whites=whites+1;}el{};};};io.println(s.concat(s.concat(s.fromint(blacks);" ");s.fromint(whites)));<0};

programs.hint: Square brackets not allowed. Use @(item1;item2;item3) for arrays and maps; arr.get(idx) for access; arr.len for length.
programs.source: m=smooth;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;i=json:std.json;f=smooth(arr:@$i64):$i64{let n=arr.len;let m=mut.0;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){m=m+arr.get(i);};let avg=m/n as$f64;<avg};f=forecast(sm:$i64;steps:$i64):$i64{let f=mut.sm;lp(let i=0;i<steps;i=i+1){f=f+1;};<f};f=main():$i64{let alpha=s.tofloat(io.readln());let values=s.split(io.readln();",");let n=values.len;let smoothed=mut@$f64[];let prev=s.tofloat(values.get(0));smoothed.push(prev);lp(let i=1;i<n;i=i+1){let val=s.tofloat(values.get(i));let newval=alpha*val+(1.0-alpha)*prev;smoothed.push(newval);prev=newval;};let forecast=prev;let smoothedstr="[";lp(let i=0;i<smoothed.len;i=i+1){if i>0{smoothedstr=s.concat(smoothedstr;",");};smoothedstr=s.concat(smoothedstr;s.fromfloat(smoothed.get(i)));};smoothedstr=s.concat(smoothedstr;"]");let result=s.concat(s.concat(s.concat(s.concat("{\"smoothed\":";smoothedstr);",\"forecast\":");s.fromfloat(forecast));"}");io.println(result);<0}

programs.hint: Unexpected token in expression. Common causes: (a) keyword used as identifier (i, f, t, m, as, el, lp, br, let, mut, rt, mt) — rename; (b) missing operator between values; (c) comma instead of semicolon (toke uses ; everywhere).
programs.source: m=extractlinks;f=extractlinks(html:$str):@$str{let result=mut.@();let len=html.len;let i=mut.0;lp(let lv=0;true;lv=lv){if(!(i<len))as i64{br};let ch=html.get(i);if(ch=60){let j=mut.i+1;lp(let lv=0;true;lv=lv){if(!(j<len))as i64{br};let c=html.get(j);if(c=62){i=j+1;br;};j=j+1;};}el{if(ch=34

programs.hint: Character outside the toke alphabet. Only lowercase a-z, digits 0-9, and toke operators allowed. Common causes: uppercase letters, underscores, or stray backslashes inside string literals (use \" exactly once per embedded quote — never JSON-style triple-escape).
Extra closing paren ')'. Count parens — every '(' needs exactly one ')'. Common cause: doubled if((cond)) or trailing paren on a call.
programs.source: m=hashtag;f=extracthashtag(line:$str):$str{let len=line.len;let idx=mut.0;let found=mut.false;lp(let i=0;i<len;i=i+1){let ch=line.get(i);if(ch="#"){found=true;idx=i+1;};};if(found){let start=idx;let end=mut.len;lp(let i=start;i<len;i=i+1){let ch=line.get(i);if(ch=" "){end=i;br;};};if(!(end>start))){end=start+1;};let hashtag=line.substr(start;end-start);<hashtag}el{<""}};f=countusage(hashtags:@$str;line:$str):i64{let count=mut.0;let len=hashtags.len;lp(let i=0;i<len;i=i+1){let h=hashtags.get(i);if(h.len>0){let found=h.len>0;if(found){count=count+1;};};};<count};f=ispopular(hashtag:$str;usagecount:i64):bool{let popular=mut.false;if(hashtag.len>0)){if(usagecount>100){popular=true;}el

programs.hint: Extra closing paren ')'. Count parens — every '(' needs exactly one ')'. Common cause: doubled if((cond)) or trailing paren on a call.
programs.source: m=protocol;f=parseversions(input:$str):@$i64{let result=mut.@();let current=mut."";let i=mut.0;lp(let idx=0;idx<input.len;idx=idx+1){let ch=input.get(idx);if(ch=";"){if(!(current.len=0 as u64))){let ver=mut.0;let j=mut.0;lp(let k=0;k<current.len;k=k+1){let digit=current.get(k);if(!(digit<"0"))){if(!(digit>"9"))){let dv=digit as i64-48;ver=ver*10+dv;};};};result=result+@(ver);current="";i=0;}el{current=current+ch;i=i+1;};}

programs.hint: Extra closing paren ')'. Count parens — every '(' needs exactly one ')'. Common cause: doubled if((cond)) or trailing paren on a call.
programs.source: m=rle;f=rle(s:$str):$str{let n=s.len;if(n=0){<""};let result=mut."";let i=mut.0;lp(let idx=0;idx<n;idx=idx+1){let current=s.get(idx);if(i=0){result=result+current;i=i+1;}el{if(current=result.get(result.len-1))){let tmp=result.len;result=result+current;}el{result=result+current;};};};<result};f=report(original:$str;encoded:$str):$str{let origlen=original.len;let enclen=encoded.len;let ratio=mut.0.0;if(origlen>0){ratio=enclen as f64/origlen as f64};let ratiostr=ratio as$str;let result=s.concat("original len: ";origlen) as$str+s.concat(", encoded len: ";enclen) as$str+", ratio: "+ratiostr;<result};f=main():$str{let original="aaabbbccccddddeee";let encoded=rle(original);let reportstr=report(original;encoded);<reportstr};

programs.source: m=loadbalance;f=assignmachine(taskid:$str;totaltasks:$i64):$str{let idx=mut.0;let found=mut.false;lp(let i=0;i<totaltasks;i=i+1){if(i=taskid){idx=i;found=true}};if(found){<("machine_"as$str)+idx as$str}el{<""}};f=main():$void{let taskids=@(1;2;3;4;5));let totaltasks=taskids.len;let assigned=mut.@();lp(let i=0;i<totaltasks;i=i+1){let taskid=taskids.get(i);let result=assignmachine(taskid;totaltasks);assigned=assigned+@(result))};lp(let i=0;i<assigned.len;i=i+1){let a=assigned.get(i);let valid=mut.false;if(!(a.len=0))){valid=true};if(valid){<a}el{<""}}};
